# Pull Request

## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code cleanup/refactoring

## Testing
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Tested in heroic dungeons
- [ ] Tested with party members
- [ ] Tested loot detection
- [ ] Tested reset functionality
- [ ] Tested UI display
- [ ] Tested across multiple dungeons
- [ ] Tested with other addons enabled

## Test Configuration
- **WoW Version**: 
- **Faction**: 
- **Class**: 
- **Dungeons Tested**: 

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style of this project
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have tested this with the latest version of the addon
- [ ] I have checked that this PR doesn't duplicate an existing PR

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.
